questionHtml:
A standing wave is formed in a pipe closed at one end. The third harmonic has a frequency of 400 Hz when the speed of sound is 300 m s−1. What is the length of the pipe?


A.  316 m

B.  916 m

C.  34 m

D.  1416 m
